3315820.name: One More Turret
3315820.description:
One More Turret is an automation and tower defense strategy game where you build and manage a huge factory. Start small, then gather new materials from different enemies to upgrade your machines. Create smart supply chains to keep your turrets loaded and make materials for expansion. Defend your core structure from ruthless enemies swarm from every direction.

AUTOMATION

Build and organize conveyor belt systems to transport materials throughout your factory. Ensure these belts deliver supplies to the right places for construction and production. This setup will keep your factory running efficiently and help you defend against incoming threats smoothly.

TOWER DEFENSE

Defend against waves of enemies to gather important resources for your factories. Each enemy you defeat provides materials that power up your production and help you build and upgrade your factory. As you face tougher waves, you turn these monsters into valuable assets, making your factory stronger and more efficient.

Don't forget to add One More Turret to your Wishlist!
3315820.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
